parameters.text:
Extract invoice data from this document . Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):
{
  "supplier_company": "supplier company name",
  "customer_tax_id": "customer Polish Tax-Id (NIP) for QAgile company i.e. 5272928285 or 6171862496",
  "customer_company": "company name",
  "invoice_number": "invoice number string with numer like 123/12/22",
  "invoice_issued_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
"invoice_issued_year": "year of issued date in YYYY format i.e. 2025"
"invoice_issued_month-pl": "polish name of the issue data month if format MM Monthname i.e. 11 Listopad",
  "invoice_amount_net": 0.00,
  "invoice_amount_tax": 0.00,
  "invoice_amount_gross": 0.00,
  "currency": "international format like PLN, USD, EUR",
  "category": "short-descriptive-slug"
}

CATEGORY SLUG RULES:
- Use 2-3 words maximum
- Lowercase, dash-separated (kebab-case)
- BE SPECIFIC: describe the actual service/product
- Use English or recognizable brand names

EXAMPLES:
- Adobe Creative Cloud → "adobe"
- Microsoft Office 365 → "msoffice"
- Fuel/Gas station → "paliwo"
- Car repair Dacia → "dacia"
- Training course → "szkolenie-agile" or "pspo-training"
- Medical insurance Medicover → "medicover"
- Mobile Orange → "orange"
- Anthropic API → "anthropic"
- Mailchimp subscription → "mailchimp"
- Office supplies → "biuro"
- Printing services → "wydruk"
- AWS cloud → "aws"
- Car paint/supplies → "lakier-auto" or "farba-volvo"
